title: Domain.com.au Real Estate Agents Scraper
description: Extract Australian real estate agent profiles from Domain.com.au with comprehensive contact details, agency information, and performance metrics

startUrl.title: Search URL
startUrl.description: Domain.com.au real estate agents search URL. Must include location with postcode (e.g., sydney-nsw-2000).

location.title: Location
location.description: Location slug including postcode (e.g., 'sydney-nsw-2000', 'melbourne-vic-3000', 'brisbane-qld-4000'). Must include suburb, state, and postcode for results.

suburb.title: Suburb with Postcode
suburb.description: Suburb with state and postcode (e.g., 'paddington-nsw-2021'). Alternative to location field.

state.title: State Capital
state.description: Australian state - will default to state capital with postcode for search.

agencyName.title: Agency Name
agencyName.description: Filter by specific real estate agency name (e.g., 'Ray White', 'LJ Hooker').

specialization.title: Specialization
specialization.description: Filter by agent specialization or property type focus.

collectDetails.title: Collect Full Agent Details
collectDetails.description: Visit each agent profile page to extract complete biography, contact info, performance metrics, and additional information. Increases runtime but provides comprehensive data.

maxResults.title: Maximum Agents
maxResults.description: Maximum number of agent profiles to collect (1-1000).

maxPages.title: Maximum Pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of result pages to process (each page typically contains 20-30 agents).

maxConcurrency.title: Detail Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Concurrent requests for detail collection (1-10). Higher values are faster but use more proxy bandwidth.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for requests. Residential proxies strongly recommended to avoid blocking.
